description: Open the WebSocket connection to the optional `/events` endpoint.
Send a `subscribe` message with the root keys to watch.
Send another `subscribe` message later to add more root keys without reopening the connection.
Normalize duplicate root keys without error and keep the most recent subscription entry.
Reply with `subscribed` to confirm the active root-key subscriptions.
Use `ping` and `pong` messages to keep the connection alive.
Send `unsubscribe` when the client no longer wants updates for those root keys.
When a user unregisters or the connection closes, remove all active subscriptions tied to that user or connection.
